Klein Moretti.eye_color: deep dark brown, appearing pitch black like the night
Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: linen shirt, matching brown coat, round felt hat, old leather shoes
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: Early 20s male, black hair, brown eyes, dressed in a sharp black tuxedo and silk top hat, carrying a plain cane.
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: Ability to see auras (Spirit Vision) by tapping his glabella twice
Klein Moretti.accessories: Silver pocket watch kept in tuxedo inner lining, black cane
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Demonstrates his new 'Seer' abilities to check Glacis's health.

Divination Club Attendant.primary_clothing: neat formal working uniform appropriate for a respectable club attendant
Divination Club Attendant.face_description: Beautiful lady who maintains a patient smile
Divination Club Attendant.visual_anchor: beautiful young female attendant with coiled brownish-yellow hair wearing a neat club uniform
Divination Club Attendant.source_notes: Visual details provided as she welcomes Klein.

Hanass Vincent.primary_clothing: Victorian gentleman's suit, likely high-quality, professional fortune-teller attire
Hanass Vincent.face_description: Distinguished and confident facial features befitting a famous mentor and resident club expert
Hanass Vincent.visual_anchor: mid-40s male, fair skin, short brown hair, wearing a high-quality Victorian suit with a confident, professional mentor expression
Hanass Vincent.color_palette: charcoal grey, deep blue, crisp white
Hanass Vincent.source_notes: Identified as the club's resident mentor; age and appearance guessed based on role.

Glacis.primary_clothing: white shirt and black vest, monocle hanging from his chest
Glacis.face_description: Slightly dark skin with dark green pupils, topped with soft light yellow hair
Glacis.visual_anchor: mid-30s male, slightly dark skin, soft light yellow hair, dark green eyes, wearing a white shirt and black vest with a monocle
Glacis.color_palette: black, white, light yellow, dark green
Glacis.distinguishing_features: Slightly dark skin, dark green pupils

Benson Moretti.primary_clothing: Linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat
Benson Moretti.face_description: Resembles Klein but lacks the scholarly air, looks older than his actual age due to work stress.
Benson Moretti.visual_anchor: mid-20s male, pale skin, short black hair, wearing working class Victorian attire, showing signs of fatigue
Benson Moretti.source_notes: Seen tapping a plain cane while negotiating rent.

Melissa Moretti.hair_style: black hair that reached down her back
Melissa Moretti.primary_clothing: grayish-white long dress that had been mended several times, old veiled hat
Melissa Moretti.visual_anchor: teenage female, pale skin, long wavy black hair, wearing a simple, slightly worn Victorian dress
Melissa Moretti.color_palette: faded blue, grey, white, soft brown
Melissa Moretti.source_notes: Mentioned when she was looking at the new house.

The Fool.face_description: features hidden by mysterious gray fog
The Fool.visual_anchor: A mysterious male figure shrouded entirely in gray fog, acting as the initiator of the secret Gathering.
The Fool.source_notes: Mentioned as the initiator of the mysterious Gathering. Appearance and details are guessed based on context as an enigmatic leader.

The Hanged Man.face_description: rugged and weathered face hidden by fog
The Hanged Man.visual_anchor: A tall, rugged man in nautical Victorian attire, sitting within the mysterious gray fog.
The Hanged Man.distinguishing_features: Innermost Ether Body/Astral Projection is deep blue, akin to the sea and a tidal storm (visible to Spirit Vision).
The Hanged Man.source_notes: Aura and Astral Projection details observed by Klein using Spirit Vision.

Old Neil.hair_style: white hair, likely short or medium as it fits under a felt hat
Old Neil.primary_clothing: Unique classic black robe that appears anachronistic, paired with a black felt hat with a rounded edge.
Old Neil.face_description: Deeply wrinkled face where the wrinkles bloom like flowers when he smiles; aged and expressive.
Old Neil.visual_anchor: elderly male, frail build, thinning white hair, wrinkled pale face, wearing worn Victorian clothing, surrounded by documents
Old Neil.distinguishing_features: Uses a double-tap to the glabella as a practical shortcut for Spirit Vision
Old Neil.accessories: Classic black felt hat with a rounded edge; darkwood ladle for potion stirring.
Old Neil.source_notes: Old Neil demonstrates the glabella-tapping 'switch' to Klein as a more efficient method than pure cogitation.

Rozanne.hair_style: long brown hair (implied by girl description)
Rozanne.primary_clothing: light green Loen-styled dress with beautiful laces on sleeves, collar, and chest
Rozanne.visual_anchor: Early 20s female, brown hair, light-brown eyes, bright forehead, wearing a light green Loen-style dress with white lace details.
Rozanne.color_palette: light green, brown, white, soft cream
Rozanne.source_notes: Identified as a brown-haired girl in the Blackthorn Security Company office.

Leonard Mitchell.face_description: handsome with a romantic temperament, deep green eyes, faint smile
Leonard Mitchell.visual_anchor: young adult male, slightly messy black hair, deep green eyes, wearing an untucked white shirt and tight trousers, romantic poet temperament
Leonard Mitchell.source_notes: Physical description given when he meets Klein at the company.

Naya.primary_clothing: Modest Victorian scholar's dress, high collar, dark green wool
Naya.face_description: Thin face, sharp intelligent eyes, focused expression, narrow nose
Naya.visual_anchor: early 20s female, fair skin, dark brown hair in a low bun, hazel eyes, wearing a dark green high-collar Victorian dress
Naya.distinguishing_features: Died by drowning herself in a washbasin
Naya.source_notes: Police confirmed her death and her soft brown hair was mentioned in Klein's vision/imagination of the scene.
